nodes.name: EnableWebSignInForPrimaryUser
nodes.description: Specifies whether web-based sign-in is enabled with the Primary User experience

enum.description: Feature defaults as appropriate for edition and device capabilities. As of now, all editions/devices exhibit Disabled behavior by default. However, this may change for future editions/devices.
Enabled. Web Sign-in Credential Provider will be enabled for device sign-in.
Disabled. Web Sign-in Credential Provider will be not be enabled for device sign-in.
